title: Binary bulk loads page gives a string load example, but it is not implemented
poc: create table Tmp( i int, f float, t date, s string);
key_bug_features: Binary bulk loads page string load example not implemented
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Tmp( i int PRIMARY KEY, f float NOT NULL, t date DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, s string);
INSERT INTO Tmp(i, f, t, s) VALUES (1, 3.14, '2023-10-01', 'test string');
INSERT INTO Tmp(i, f, t, s) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM Tmp WHERE f IS NULL OR s LIKE 'test%';
UPDATE Tmp SET f = f + 1 WHERE i = 1;
